steps.title: Identify the emphasis on local sourcing
steps.content: Every example highlights local sourcing: Taylor uses Arizona plants, Arizona dock roots, and clay from nearby soil. The passage repeatedly shows her drawing materials from her immediate environment.

steps.title: Apply to the answer choices
steps.content: The remaining alternative uses to dye wool. directly states the main idea—Taylor draws on local resources in her dyeing approach. Reds and browns are not commonly featured in most of Taylor's rugs. narrows to just one color in one rug; the remaining alternative invents difficulty never mentioned; the remaining alternative adds acclaim and techniques beyond the text. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
